steps.assistant_text: Standard int-reader C body; matched the ROM's -O0 accessor scheduling in the Yay0 single-object USO with post-cc INSN_PATCH and SUFFIX_BYTES_FORCE.

metadata.verification: make RUN_CC_CHECK=0; objdiff-cli report generate -o report.json; direct build/src/timproc_uso_b1/timproc_uso_b1.c.o vs expected .text byte check; objdump -M no-aliases.
